# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Discarded: this source should not enter the institute as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

The excerpt presents a methodology and research roadmap for “promptware engineering,” but it does not show concrete experiments, benchmark tables, production telemetry, incident evidence, or field results. It is primarily conceptual and programmatic rather than evidentiary, so it does not meet the institute’s admission threshold.

## Limits
